title: StudyIQ Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: StudyIQ Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
